<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8' standalone='no'?> <svg height="20" version="1.2" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:atv="http://webmi.atvise.com/2007/svgext" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <defs/> <metadata> <atv:gridconfig enabled="false" gridstyle="lines" height="20" width="20"/> <atv:snapconfig enabled="true" height="10" width="10"/> </metadata> <rect atv:refpx="10" atv:refpy="10" fill="#428bc2" height="14" id="id_1" stroke="#428bc2" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="6" width="14" x="3" y="3"/> <text atv:refpx="10" atv:refpy="10" fill="#ffffff" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" id="id_0" x="6" y="14.5">R</text> <script atv:desc="" atv:name="" type="text/ecmascript"/> </svg>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8' standalone='no'?> <svg height="20" version="1.2" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:atv="http://webmi.atvise.com/2007/svgext" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <defs/> <metadata> <atv:gridconfig enabled="false" gridstyle="lines" height="20" width="20"/> <atv:snapconfig enabled="true" height="10" width="10"/> </metadata> <rect atv:refpx="10" atv:refpy="10" fill="#428bc2" height="14" id="id_1" stroke="#428bc2" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="6" width="14" x="3" y="3"/> <text atv:refpx="9.5" atv:refpy="10" fill="#ffffff" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" id="id_0" x="6" y="14.5">S</text> <script atv:desc="" atv:name="" type="text/ecmascript"/> </svg>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8' standalone='no'?> <svg height="20" version="1.2" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:atv="http://webmi.atvise.com/2007/svgext" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <defs/> <metadata> <atv:gridconfig enabled="false" gridstyle="lines" height="20" width="20"/> <atv:snapconfig enabled="true" height="10" width="10"/> </metadata> <rect atv:refpx="10" atv:refpy="10" fill="#575757" height="14" id="id_1" stroke="#575757" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="6" width="14" x="3" y="3"/> <text atv:refpx="5.933" atv:refpy="10" fill="#ffffff" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" id="id_0" x="2" y="14.5">DB</text> <script atv:desc="" atv:name="" type="text/ecmascript"/> </svg>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<script>
  <metadata>
    <priority>0</priority>
  </metadata>
  <parameter name="startup" type="startup" trigger="true" relative="false" value=""/>
  <parameter name="currentStepNode" type="node" trigger="true" relative="false" value="ns=1;s=AGENT.OBJECTS.ATVISE.ArchiveManagement.currentStep"/>
  <parameter name="statusPrimaryNode" type="node" trigger="true" relative="false" value="ns=1;s=AGENT.REDUNDANCY.PRIMARY.INFORMATION.GENERAL.ArchiveManagement.status"/>
  <parameter name="statusSecondaryNode" type="node" trigger="true" relative="false" value="ns=1;s=AGENT.REDUNDANCY.SECONDARY.INFORMATION.GENERAL.ArchiveManagement.status"/>
  <parameter name="statusDetailsNode" type="node.value" trigger="false" relative="false" value="ns=1;s=AGENT.OBJECTS.ATVISE.ArchiveManagement.statusDetails"/>
  <parameter name="transferDetailsNode" type="node.value" trigger="false" relative="false" value="ns=1;s=AGENT.OBJECTS.ATVISE.ArchiveManagement.transferDetails"/>
  <code><![CDATA[var prefix =
	currentStepNode != null && currentStepNode.trigger
		? "currentStepNode" + currentStepNode.servertime.getTime() + "/" + currentStepNode.sourcetime.getTime()
		: statusPrimaryNode != null && statusPrimaryNode.trigger
		? "statusPrimaryNode" + statusPrimaryNode.servertime.getTime() + "/" + statusPrimaryNode.sourcetime.getTime()
		: statusSecondaryNode != null && statusSecondaryNode.trigger
		? "statusSecondaryNode" + statusSecondaryNode.servertime.getTime() + "/" + statusSecondaryNode.sourcetime.getTime()
		: "unknown";

var statusLocal = "SYSTEM.INFORMATION.GENERAL.ArchiveManagement.status";
var statusLocalNode = Ua.findNode(statusLocal);
var statusLocalNodeExist = Ua.Status(statusLocalNode) != Ua.Status.BADNODEIDUNKNOWN;

var parent = statusLocal.substring(0, statusLocal.lastIndexOf("."));
var parentNode = Ua.findNode(parent);
var parentExist = Ua.Status(parentNode) != Ua.Status.BADNODEIDUNKNOWN;

if (!parentExist) {
	Ua.createNode(parent, {
		nodeClass: Ua.NodeClass["OBJECT"],
		parent: parent.substring(0, parent.lastIndexOf(".")),
		typeDefinition: "i=61"
	});
}

if (!statusLocalNodeExist) {
	Ua.createNode(statusLocal, {
		nodeClass: Ua.NodeClass["VARIABLE"],
		parent: parent,
		typeDefinition: "i=62",
		dataType: Ua.DataType["STRING"],
		value: ""
	});
}

// if server is starting reset values
if (startup != null) {
	// needs to be reset so there is a clean start
	statusLocalNode = Ua.findNode("SYSTEM.INFORMATION.GENERAL.ArchiveManagement.status");
	statusLocalNodeExist = Ua.Status(statusLocalNode) != Ua.Status.BADNODEIDUNKNOWN;

	if (statusLocalNodeExist) {
		statusLocalNode.result.assign({
			value: JSON.stringify({
				step: "reset",
				errors: []
			})
		});
	}

	return;
}

var statusDetails;
var transferDetails;

// initial data checking/parsing
if (statusDetailsNode != null) {
	try {
		statusDetails = JSON.parse(statusDetailsNode);
		if (
			!("locked" in statusDetails) ||
			!("active" in statusDetails) ||
			!("errors" in statusDetails) ||
			!Array.isArray(statusDetails.errors) ||
			!("currentOperationIndex" in statusDetails) ||
			!("logger" in statusDetails) ||
			!("error" in statusDetails.logger) ||
			!("info" in statusDetails.logger) ||
			!("group" in statusDetails.logger.error) ||
			!("subgroup" in statusDetails.logger.error) ||
			!("label" in statusDetails.logger.error) ||
			!("group" in statusDetails.logger.info) ||
			!("subgroup" in statusDetails.logger.info) ||
			!("label" in statusDetails.logger.info) ||
			!("user" in statusDetails.logger)
		) {
			statusDetails = null;
			debugLog("statusDetails not in expected format");
		}
	} catch (error) {
		statusDetails = null;
	}

	if (statusDetails == null) {
		debugLog("statusDetails raw: ", statusDetailsNode);
	}
}

if (transferDetailsNode != null) {
	try {
		transferDetails = JSON.parse(transferDetailsNode);
		if (!Array.isArray(transferDetails)) {
			transferDetails = null;
			debugLog("transferDetails not an array");
		} else {
			for (var operation in transferDetails) {
				if (
					!("name" in transferDetails[operation]) ||
					!("sourceType" in transferDetails[operation]) ||
					!("destinationType" in transferDetails[operation]) ||
					!("action" in transferDetails[operation]) ||
					!("locked" in transferDetails[operation])
				) {
					transferDetails = null;
					debugLog("on of the operation is not in expected format");
					break;
				}
			}
		}
	} catch (error) {
		transferDetails = null;
	}

	if (transferDetails == null) {
		debugLog("transferDetails raw: ", transferDetailsNode);
	}
}

if (!statusDetails || !transferDetails) {
	debugLog("data ambiguous");
	return;
}

var reduNode = Ua.findNode("AGENT.REDUNDANCY");
var reduExist = Ua.Status(reduNode) != Ua.Status.BADNODEIDUNKNOWN;

// redu values
var redu = {
	on: reduExist
};

var reduStatusNode = Ua.findNode("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.status");
redu.status = redu.on ? reduStatusNode.result.value : "Active";

var reduRoleNode = Ua.findNode("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.role");
redu.role = redu.on ? reduRoleNode.result.value : "";
Object.freeze(redu);

// if step is finished nothing to do (except unlocking)
if (currentStepNode.value == "finished") {
	debugLog("currentStep is finished; exiting");
	globals.set("com.atvise.archiveManagement.lock", false);
	var transfers = [];
	var transTmp;
	transferDetails.forEach(function (td) {
		transTmp = td.action + " from " + td.sourceType + (td.destinationType != null ? " to " + td.destinationType : "");
		if (!transfers.includes(transTmp)) {
			transfers.push(transTmp);
		}
	});
	var msg = ("Finished. " + transfers.join(" ")).trim();
	writeLogger(msg, "info");

	debugLog("checking if user should be informed ", statusDetails);
	// check if we need to send mail
	if (
		typeof statusDetails === "object" &&
		statusDetails !== null &&
		"autoSchedulerConfigAddr" in statusDetails &&
		"errors" in statusDetails &&
		Array.isArray(statusDetails.errors) &&
		statusDetails.errors.length > 0
	) {
		var autoSchedulerConfigNode = Ua.findNode(statusDetails.autoSchedulerConfigAddr);

		var globalConfig = null;

		try {
			if (autoSchedulerConfigNode.result.value.trim() != "") {
				globalConfig = Object.seal(JSON.parse(autoSchedulerConfigNode.result.value));
			}
		} catch (e) {
			// do nothing
		}

		debugLog("globalConfig ", globalConfig);

		debugLog(
			"checking if reporting to server logfile ",
			typeof globalConfig === "object" &&
				globalConfig != null &&
				"active" in globalConfig &&
				globalConfig.active &&
				"report" in globalConfig &&
				globalConfig.report &&
				"logfiles" in globalConfig.report &&
				globalConfig.report.logfiles
		);

		if (
			typeof globalConfig === "object" &&
			globalConfig != null &&
			"active" in globalConfig &&
			globalConfig.active &&
			"report" in globalConfig &&
			globalConfig.report &&
			"logfiles" in globalConfig.report &&
			globalConfig.report.logfiles
		) {
			// reporting auto-scheduler errors to server logfile
			console.error("Auto-scheduler transfers finished: ", transfers.join(" "));
			console.error("Auto-scheduler errors: ", statusDetails.errors.join("\n"));
		}

		debugLog(
			"checking if mail can be send ",
			typeof globalConfig === "object" &&
				globalConfig !== null &&
				"active" in globalConfig &&
				"report" in globalConfig &&
				"email" in globalConfig.report &&
				"mailFrom" in globalConfig.report &&
				"mailTo" in globalConfig.report &&
				"smtp" in globalConfig.report &&
				globalConfig.active &&
				globalConfig.report.email &&
				globalConfig.report.smtp.trim() != "" &&
				globalConfig.report.mailFrom.trim() != "" &&
				globalConfig.report.mailTo.trim() != ""
		);

		// check if config for mail settings are present
		if (
			typeof globalConfig === "object" &&
			globalConfig !== null &&
			"active" in globalConfig &&
			"report" in globalConfig &&
			"email" in globalConfig.report &&
			"mailFrom" in globalConfig.report &&
			"mailTo" in globalConfig.report &&
			"smtp" in globalConfig.report &&
			globalConfig.active &&
			globalConfig.report.email &&
			globalConfig.report.smtp.trim() != "" &&
			globalConfig.report.mailFrom.trim() != "" &&
			globalConfig.report.mailTo.trim() != ""
		) {
			msg += "\n\nErrors:\n" + statusDetails.errors.join("\n");
			debugLog("smtpserver ", globalConfig.report.smtp);
			debugLog("from ", globalConfig.report.mailFrom);
			debugLog("to ", globalConfig.report.mailTo);
			debugLog("msg to send ", msg);
			debugLog("redu.on ", redu.on);
			debugLog("redu.role ", redu.role);
			debugLog("statusDetails.active ", statusDetails.active);
			debugLog("send mail? ", !redu.on || (redu.on && redu.role == statusDetails.active));
			if (!redu.on || (redu.on && redu.role == statusDetails.active)) {
				debugLog("sending mail");
				call("Mail.SendMail", {
					smtpserver: globalConfig.report.smtp,
					from: globalConfig.report.mailFrom,
					to: globalConfig.report.mailTo,
					subject: "atvise auto-scheduler event",
					body: msg
				});
			}
			statusDetails.active = null;
			updateStatusDetails();
		}
	}

	return;
}

if (redu.on) {
	// is system in a state where we should not proceed?
	debugLog("get system_splitmode");

	var splitModeNode = Ua.findNode("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.system_splitmode");
	var splitModeExist = Ua.Status(splitModeNode) != Ua.Status.BADNODEIDUNKNOWN;

	debugLog("get replication_status");

	var replicationStatusNode = Ua.findNode("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.replication_status");
	var replicationStatusExist = Ua.Status(replicationStatusNode) != Ua.Status.BADNODEIDUNKNOWN;

	debugLog(
		"check if in split mode (",
		splitModeNode.result.value,
		") or replication is in progress (",
		replicationStatusNode.result.value,
		")"
	);

	// if in split mode or replication is in progress cancel all operations
	if (
		(splitModeExist && splitModeNode.result.value == true) ||
		(replicationStatusExist && replicationStatusNode.result.value != "Ready")
	) {
		debugLog("System is either in split mode or replication is in progress; exit immediately");
		statusDetails.locked = false;
		updateStatusDetails();
		updateCurrentStep("finished");
		return;
	}

	if (statusPrimaryNode.trigger && statusPrimaryNode.sourcetime.getTime() == 0) {
		debugLog("statusPrimary triggered, but sourcetime 0; exiting");
		return;
	}
}

function debugLog(...msg) {
	if (typeof debug != "undefined" && debug) {
		console.log("ArchiveManagement " + prefix + ": ", ...msg);
	}
}

/**
 * Checks if a redundancy server is disconnected.
 * @param {string} serverRole - The role of the server to check ("PRIMARY" or "SECONDARY").
 * @returns {boolean} True if the server is disconnected, false otherwise.
 */
function isServerDisconnected(serverRole) {
	try {
		const role = serverRole.toUpperCase();
		const nodeAddress = `AGENT.REDUNDANCY.${role}.status`;
		const result = Ua.findNode(nodeAddress).result;

		if (result?.status?.value === Ua.Status.BADNOCOMMUNICATION) {
			return true;
		}

		if (!result?.status) {
			debugLog(`Could not determine connection status for server: ${role}. Assuming disconnected.`);
			return true;
		}

		return false;
	} catch (error) {
		debugLog(`Error checking server connection status for ${serverRole}: ${error.message}`);
		return true;
	}
}

// parse statuses
debugLog("try parsing statuses");
var statusPri = null;
var statusSec = null;

if (redu.on) {
	statusPri = parseStatus("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.PRIMARY.INFORMATION.GENERAL.ArchiveManagement.status");
	statusSec = parseStatus("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.SECONDARY.INFORMATION.GENERAL.ArchiveManagement.status");
}

function parseStatus(nodeAddr) {
	var status = null;

	var nodeNode = Ua.findNode(nodeAddr);
	var nodeExist = Ua.Status(nodeNode) != Ua.Status.BADNODEIDUNKNOWN;
	var nodeGood = Ua.Status(nodeNode).value == Ua.Status.GOOD;

	try {
		if (nodeExist && nodeGood) {
			status = JSON.parse(nodeNode.result.value);
			debugLog("status of " + nodeAddr + ": ", status);
		}
	} catch (error) {
		debugLog("can't parse status for " + nodeAddr);
	}

	return status;
}

function updateStatusDetails() {
	var sdNode = Ua.findNode("AGENT.OBJECTS.ATVISE.ArchiveManagement.statusDetails");

	debugLog("updating statusDetails");

	sdNode.result.assign({
		value: JSON.stringify(statusDetails)
	});
}

function updateCurrentStep(value) {
	var csNode = Ua.findNode("AGENT.OBJECTS.ATVISE.ArchiveManagement.currentStep");

	// Only active server writes to node and triggers next call of script!

	debugLog("currentStepNode updated with ", value);

	csNode.result.assign({
		value: value
	});
}

function triggeringNextStep(errorDuringStep) {
	// lock changing of currentStepNode
	if (globals.get("com.atvise.archiveManagement.lock")) {
		debugLog("next step is about to change, don't change it twice so exiting");
		return;
	}
	debugLog("lock changing of currentStepNode");
	globals.set("com.atvise.archiveManagement.lock", true);

	// determine next step
	var currentStepNode_value = "";
	switch (currentStepNode.value) {
		case "start":
			currentStepNode_value = errorDuringStep ? "end" : "delete";
			break;
		case "delete":
			currentStepNode_value = "end";
			break;
		case "end":
			currentStepNode_value = "start";
			statusDetails.currentOperationIndex++;
			updateStatusDetails();
			break;
	}

	// triggering next step
	updateCurrentStep(currentStepNode_value);
}

function writeLogger(msg, type) {
	debugLog("writeLogger: start");
	debugLog("writeLogger: statusDetails: ", statusDetails);
	debugLog("writeLogger: statusDetails.logger: ", statusDetails.logger);
	var writeObj = { ...statusDetails.logger };
	delete writeObj.error;
	delete writeObj.info;
	if (type in statusDetails.logger) {
		writeObj.group = statusDetails.logger[type].group;
		writeObj.subgroup = statusDetails.logger[type].subgroup;
		writeObj.label = statusDetails.logger[type].label;
	} else {
		writeObj.group = "atvise";
		writeObj.subgroup = "error";
		writeObj.label = "Archive Management";
	}
	writeObj.message = msg;
	debugLog("writeLogger: writing message ", writeObj);
	call("SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.SERVERSCRIPTS.Logger.WriteLog", writeObj);
	debugLog("writeLogger: finished");
}

// debug infos
debugLog("currentStepNode.trigger: ", currentStepNode.trigger);
if (redu.on) {
	debugLog("statusPrimaryNode.trigger: ", statusPrimaryNode.trigger);
	debugLog("statusSecondaryNode.trigger: ", statusSecondaryNode.trigger);
}
debugLog("currentStepNode.value: ", currentStepNode.value);
debugLog("statusDetails: ", statusDetails);

if (redu.on) {
	// identify Active server
	if (statusDetails.active == null) {
		if (redu.status == "Active") {
			debugLog("setting active server to " + redu.role);
			// server redu role is saved to recognize the active server on start of all operations
			statusDetails.active = redu.role;
			updateStatusDetails();
		} else {
			var pretendActive = redu.role == "Primary" ? "Secondary" : "Primary";
			debugLog("pretending setting active server to " + pretendActive);
			statusDetails.active = pretendActive;
		}
	} else if (statusDetails.active != null) {
		debugLog("active server on start of operations " + statusDetails.active);
	}

	// if anything but currentStep has triggered...
	if (!currentStepNode.trigger) {
		var errorDuringStep = false;
		// check the hell out of it, if currentStep needs to be changed
		// check if Passive is executing script and end in a controlled manner
		if (redu.status == "Passive") {
			debugLog("I'm Passive, I don't decide anything; exiting");
			return;
		}

		const primaryIsDisconnected = isServerDisconnected("PRIMARY");
		const secondaryIsDisconnected = isServerDisconnected("SECONDARY");

		// wait till all are on the same step, but IGNORE a server if it's disconnected
		if (
			(statusPri && !primaryIsDisconnected && currentStepNode.value != statusPri.step) ||
			(statusSec && !secondaryIsDisconnected && currentStepNode.value != statusSec.step)
		) {
			debugLog(
				"servers not on step " +
					currentStepNode.value +
					" (pri/sec " +
					statusPri.step +
					"/" +
					statusSec.step +
					"); waiting"
			);
			return;
		}

		// ignore trigger from myself if the other isn't finished UNLESS the other is disconnected.
		// Do we need the check if currentStepNode.value != statusSec.step?  Isn't this already checked with "wait till all are on the same step"?
		if (
			redu.role == "Primary" &&
			statusPrimaryNode.trigger &&
			!secondaryIsDisconnected &&
			currentStepNode.value != statusSec.step
		) {
			debugLog("triggering myself and secondary not finished");
			return;
		}

		if (
			redu.role == "Secondary" &&
			statusSecondaryNode.trigger &&
			!primaryIsDisconnected &&
			currentStepNode.value != statusPri.step
		) {
			debugLog("triggering myself and primary not finished");
			return;
		}

		// check if error occurred in step on Primary
		// Do we need the check if currentStepNode.value == statusPri.step?  Isn't this already checked with "wait till all are on the same step"?
		if (currentStepNode.value == statusPri.step && Array.isArray(statusPri.errors) && statusPri.errors.length > 0) {
			debugLog("error during step " + currentStepNode.value + " occurred on Primary");
			errorDuringStep = true;
			statusDetails.errors = statusDetails.errors.concat(statusPri.errors);
			updateStatusDetails();
			statusPri.errors.forEach(function (msg) {
				writeLogger(msg, "error");
			});
		}

		// check if error occurred in step on Secondary
		// Do we need the check if currentStepNode.value == statusSec.step?  Isn't this already checked with "wait till all are on the same step"?
		if (currentStepNode.value == statusSec.step && Array.isArray(statusSec.errors) && statusSec.errors.length > 0) {
			debugLog("error during step " + currentStepNode.value + " occurred on Secondary");
			errorDuringStep = true;
			statusDetails.errors = statusDetails.errors.concat(statusSec.errors);
			updateStatusDetails();
			statusSec.errors.forEach(function (msg) {
				writeLogger(msg, "error");
			});
		}

		debugLog(
			"assuming everything is set (pri/sec " + statusPri.step + "/" + statusSec.step + "); triggering next step"
		);

		triggeringNextStep(errorDuringStep);
		return;
	}
}

// check of currentOperationIndex
if (typeof statusDetails.currentOperationIndex != "number") {
	debugLog("currentOperationIndex is not a number; exiting");
	return;
}

debugLog(
	"currentOperationIndex: " + statusDetails.currentOperationIndex + " / count operations: " + transferDetails.length
);
if (statusDetails.currentOperationIndex >= transferDetails.length) {
	debugLog("all operations processed");

	// initially active server starting sync
	if (redu.on && redu.role == statusDetails.active) {
		debugLog("initiate replication");
		call("Redundancy.Replicate", { type: 3 });
	}

	statusDetails.locked = false;
	updateStatusDetails();

	// triggering step finished
	updateCurrentStep("finished");
	return;
}

debugLog("statusDetails: ", statusDetails);

// unlock changing of currentStepNode (aka allow changing/triggering of currentStep)
globals.set("com.atvise.archiveManagement.lock", false);

debugLog("assuming everything is set; do work");

operation = transferDetails[statusDetails.currentOperationIndex];
debugLog("operation: ", operation);

// initiate paths and FileOperations
var fileOp = call("Utilities.FileOperations");

var paths = {};
fileOp
	.getDirectories()
	.concat({ type: "systemdb", path: server.database.directory })
	.forEach(function (dir) {
		if (!("error" in dir)) {
			paths[dir.type] = dir.path;
		}
	});
Object.freeze(paths);

var errors = [];
const lockExtension = ".lck";

function pushError(msg) {
	msg = (redu.role + " ").trimStart() + msg;
	if (!errors.includes(msg)) {
		debugLog("pushError: ", msg);
		errors.push(msg);
	}
}

function lockFile(file) {
	debugLog("lockFile: start file '" + file + "'");
	var resultLock = call("Methods.ArchiveLocking.Lock", { archivename: file, timeout: 10 });
	debugLog("lockFile: result lock " + JSON.stringify(resultLock));
	if ("error" in resultLock) {
		var lastindex = Math.max(file.lastIndexOf("/"), file.lastIndexOf("\\"));
		var filename = lastindex > -1 ? file.substring(lastindex + 1) : file;
		if ("errorstring" in resultLock && resultLock["errorstring"] == "BadUserAccessDenied")
			pushError(filename + " could not be processed. Access denied.");
		else if ("errorstring" in resultLock && resultLock["errorstring"] == "BadInvalidState")
			pushError(filename + " is currently in use by the server or archive group is not configured.");
		else pushError(filename + " could not be locked.");
	}

	debugLog("lockFile: finished");
	return !("error" in resultLock);
}

function checkAndGetFilePath(dir) {
	debugLog("checkAndGetFilePath: start");

	if (!(dir in paths)) {
		var msg = "Path for " + dir + " is not available.";
		pushError(msg);
		debugLog("checkAndGetFilePath: " + msg);
		throw new Error(msg + " Skipping entry.");
	}

	debugLog("checkAndGetFilePath: filename: " + operation.name);
	var path = paths[dir] + operation.name;
	debugLog("checkAndGetFilePath: path: " + path);

	debugLog("checkAndGetFilePath: check isFile");
	if (!fileOp.isFile(path)) {
		msg = operation.name + " is not a file.";
		pushError(msg);
		debugLog("checkAndGetFilePath: throwing Error; is not a file");
		throw new Error(msg + " Skipping entry.");
	}

	debugLog("checkAndGetFilePath: finished");
	return path;
}

function createLockFile() {
	// placed by hand?
	if (operation.sourceType == "backup" || operation.sourceType == "restore") {
		var file = checkAndGetFilePath(operation.destinationType) + lockExtension;
		// than create lock file
		if (!fileOp.createFile(file)) {
			pushError("Lock for file " + operation.name + " in " + operation.destinationType + " couldn't be created.");
		}
	}
}

function stepStart() {
	debugLog("start: start");

	function lZ(number) {
		return number < 10 ? "0" + number : number;
	}

	var result = false;
	try {
		if (operation.action == "delete") {
			// deleting file is requested; skipping step
			debugLog("start: skipping step because delete is requested");
			return;
		}

		// work needs to be done?
		// only copy file if role is the same as the initial active server role and destination is backup, otherwise we are done with this step
		if (redu.on && operation.destinationType == "backup" && statusDetails.active != redu.role) {
			debugLog("start: current server is not the same as active server on start of operations");
			return;
		}

		var file = checkAndGetFilePath(operation.sourceType);
		debugLog("start: path of file: " + file);

		// check if destination exists
		if (!(operation.destinationType in paths)) {
			pushError("Path for " + operation.destinationType + " is not available.");
			return;
		}

		operation.locked = false;

		// lock file only if we need to
		if (
			(operation.sourceType == "historydir" || operation.sourceType == "swapin") &&
			operation.sourceType != operation.destinationType
		) {
			debugLog("start: lockFile and mark file as un/locked");
			// mark source file as locked
			operation.locked = lockFile(file);
		} else if (
			operation.sourceType == "systemdb" ||
			operation.sourceType == "backup" ||
			operation.sourceType == "restore"
		) {
			operation.locked = true;
		} else {
			pushError("Operation for " + operation.name + " invalid");
			return;
		}

		// transfer source file
		if (operation.locked) {
			var msg = operation.name + " could not be copied.";
			if (operation.sourceType == "systemdb") {
				if ((result = operation.action == "copy" && operation.destinationType == "backup")) {
					var timestamp = new Date();
					var match = /^(.*)(\.db)$/.exec(operation.name);
					if (match == null || match.length != 3) {
						debugLog("start: systemdb name doesn't match expected pattern");
					} else {
						debugLog("start: server.database.backup");
						server.database.backup({
							filename:
								paths[operation.destinationType] +
								match[1] +
								"_backup_" +
								timestamp.getFullYear() +
								lZ(timestamp.getMonth() + 1) +
								lZ(timestamp.getDate()) +
								"_" +
								lZ(timestamp.getHours()) +
								lZ(timestamp.getMinutes()) +
								lZ(timestamp.getSeconds()) +
								match[2]
						});

						var date = Date.now();

						var backupStatusNode = Ua.findNode("ModuleStatistics.DATABASE.BackupStatus");

						// check every second if backup of system database is done
						while (backupStatusNode.result.value.startsWith("Backup running")) {
							debugLog("start: backupStatus: ", backupStatusNode.result.value);
							while (Date.now() - date < 500);
							date = Date.now();
							debugLog("start: check ModuleStatistics.DATABASE.BackupStatus node");
						}
						debugLog("start: end backupStatus: ", backupStatusNode.result.value);
						result = backupStatusNode.result.value.startsWith("Backup success");
						msg = backupStatusNode.result.value;
					}
				}
			} else if (
				operation.action == "move" &&
				(operation.sourceType == "historydir" || operation.sourceType == "swapin") &&
				(operation.destinationType == "backup" || operation.destinationType == "swapin")
			) {
				if (statusDetails.logger.user == "autoscheduler" && fileOp.isFile(file + lockExtension)) {
					debugLog("start: autoscheduler isn't allowed to operate on manually copied/moved files");
					return;
				}
				debugLog("start: moveFile");
				// move source file to destination
				result = fileOp.moveFile(file, paths[operation.destinationType]);
				debugLog("start: moveFile result: " + result);
				if (fileOp.isFile(paths[operation.destinationType] + operation.name)) {
					if (operation.destinationType == "swapin") {
						createLockFile();
					}
					if (!result) {
						pushError("File " + operation.name + " already exists in " + operation.destinationType + ".");
					}
				}
				msg = operation.name + " could not be moved.";
			} else if (
				(operation.destinationType == "swapin" &&
					((operation.sourceType == "backup" && operation.action == "copy") || operation.sourceType == "restore")) ||
				(operation.destinationType == "backup" &&
					(operation.sourceType == "historydir" || operation.sourceType == "swapin"))
			) {
				if (statusDetails.logger.user == "autoscheduler" && fileOp.isFile(file + lockExtension)) {
					debugLog("start: autoscheduler isn't allowed to operate on manually copied/moved files");
					return;
				}
				debugLog("start: copyFile");
				// copy source file to destination
				result = fileOp.copyFile(file, paths[operation.destinationType]);
				debugLog("start: copyFile result: " + result);
				if (fileOp.isFile(paths[operation.destinationType] + operation.name)) {
					if (operation.destinationType == "swapin") {
						createLockFile();
					}
					if (!result) {
						pushError("File " + operation.name + " already exists in " + operation.destinationType + ".");
					}
				}
			} else {
				pushError("Operation for " + operation.name + " invalid");
				return;
			}

			// was copy successful?
			if (result == false) {
				// no, pushing error
				pushError(msg);
			} else {
				//yes, check for next step
				debugLog("start: success");
			}
		} else {
			debugLog("start: file can't be locked");
			// can't lock source file; skip this file
			pushError("Locking of " + operation.name + " wasn't successful.");
		}
	} finally {
		debugLog("start: finished");
	}
}

function stepDelete() {
	debugLog("delete: start");
	var result = false;
	try {
		if (!(operation.sourceType in paths)) {
			pushError("Path for " + operation.sourceType + " is not available.");
			return;
		}
		var file = paths[operation.sourceType] + operation.name;
		debugLog("delete: path of file: " + file);

		debugLog("delete: check isFile ");
		if (!fileOp.isFile(file)) {
			debugLog("delete: file not present; assuming moved");
			operation.locked = false;
			return;
		}

		debugLog("delete: lockFile");
		// try locking source file
		if (operation.sourceType == "backup" || operation.sourceType == "systemdb") {
			debugLog("delete: sourceType doesn't allow to delete");
			operation.locked = false;
			if (operation.sourceType == "backup" && (operation.action == "move" || operation.action == "delete")) {
				pushError(operation.name + " can't be deleted from " + operation.sourceType);
			}
		} else if (!operation.locked) {
			debugLog("delete: lockFile and mark file as un/locked");
			// mark source file as locked
			operation.locked = operation.sourceType == "restore" || lockFile(file);
			debugLog("delete: result lockFile: ", operation.locked);
		}

		debugLog("delete: action ", operation.action);
		// check whether the file indeed should be deleted
		if ((operation.action == "move" || operation.action == "delete") && operation.locked) {
			if (statusDetails.logger.user == "autoscheduler" && fileOp.isFile(file + lockExtension)) {
				debugLog("delete: autoscheduler isn't allowed to operate on manually copied/moved files");
				return;
			}
			debugLog("delete: delete file ", file);
			// try delete file
			result = fileOp.deleteFile(file);
			debugLog("delete: delete file result: ", result);
			if (fileOp.isFile(file + lockExtension)) {
				result = fileOp.deleteFile(file + lockExtension);
				debugLog("delete: delete lock file result: ", result);
			}
			// was delete successful?
			if (result == false) {
				// no, pushing error
				pushError(operation.name + " could not be deleted from " + operation.sourceType + ".");
			}
		} else {
			debugLog("delete: not necessary; skipping");
		}
	} finally {
		debugLog("delete: finished");
	}
}

function stepEnd() {
	debugLog("end: start");
	try {
		debugLog("end: check if locked (", operation.locked, ") and unlock");
		if (operation.locked) {
			try {
				var file = checkAndGetFilePath(operation.sourceType);
				debugLog("end: file is there, unlocking");
				operation.locked = call("Methods.ArchiveLocking.Unlock", { archivename: file });
				operation.locked = "error" in operation.locked;
				if (operation.locked) {
					pushError(operation.name + " could not be unlocked.");
				}
			} catch (error) {
				debugLog("end: file not present, assuming file was moved/deleted");
				// if not, assuming it was moved/deleted
				operation.locked = false;
			} finally {
				debugLog("end: unlock done; operation.locked ", operation.locked);
			}
		}
	} finally {
		debugLog("end: finished");
	}
}

var steps = {
	start: stepStart,
	delete: stepDelete,
	end: stepEnd
};

// do work
debugLog("do actual work for step ", currentStepNode.value);

try {
	debugLog("check if step (" + currentStepNode.value + ") is implemented");
	// check if step is valid
	if (currentStepNode.value in steps) {
		debugLog("executing step ", currentStepNode.value);
		steps[currentStepNode.value]();
	} else {
		debugLog("step is not valid; skipping");
		pushError("Invalid step " + currentStepNode.value);
	}
} catch (error) {
	// error while executing step
	debugLog("error");
	if (error instanceof Error) {
		debugLog("error object: " + error.message);
		console.error(error.message);
		pushError(error.message);
		if (typeof console.trace == "function") {
			console.trace();
		} else if ("stack" in error) {
			console.error(error.stack);
		}
	} else if (typeof error == "string") {
		debugLog("error: ", error);
		console.error(error);
		pushError(error);
	} else {
		debugLog("error: Undisclosed error: ", error.toString());
		console.error("Undisclosed error: ", error);
		pushError(error.toString());
	}
} finally {
	debugLog("set status with step ", currentStepNode.value, " and errors (if any)");

	var finalNode = Ua.findNode("SYSTEM.INFORMATION.GENERAL.ArchiveManagement.status");

	finalNode.result.assign({
		value: JSON.stringify({
			step: currentStepNode.value,
			errors: errors
		})
	});

	if (!redu.on) {
		if (errors.length > 0) {
			statusDetails.errors = statusDetails.errors.concat(errors);
			updateStatusDetails();
			statusDetails.errors.forEach(function (msg) {
				writeLogger(msg, "error");
			});
		}
		debugLog("triggering next step");
		triggeringNextStep(errors.length > 0);
	}
	debugLog("finished");
}
]]></code>
</script>
'; return nodeValue; } return true; ]]>
